Dunsparce

#0205 Forretress #0207 Gligar
  • Contents
  • Info
  • Base stats
  • Evolution chart
  • Pokédex entries
  • Moves learned
  • Sprites
  • Locations
  • Language

Dunsparce is a Normal type Pokémon introduced in Generation 2.

Dunsparce

Additional artwork

Pokédex data

National № 0206
Type Normal
Species Land Snake Pokémon
Height 1.5 m (4′11″)
Weight 14.0 kg (30.9 lbs)
Abilities 1. Serene Grace
2. Run Away
Rattled (hidden ability)
Local № 0052 (Gold/Silver/Crystal)
0052 (HeartGold/SoulSilver)
0035 (Black 2/White 2)
0040 (X/Y — Central Kalos)
0063 (U.Sun/U.Moon — Alola dex)
0188 (Scarlet/Violet)
0052 (The Isle of Armor)
0160 (The Teal Mask)

Training

EV yield 1 HP
Catch rate 190 (24.8% with PokéBall, full HP)
Base Friendship 50 (normal)
Base Exp. 145
Growth Rate Medium Fast

Breeding

Egg Groups Field
Gender 50% male, 50% female
Egg cycles 20 (4,884–5,140 steps)

Base stats

HP 100
310 404
Attack 70
130 262
Defense 70
130 262
Sp. Atk 65
121 251
Sp. Def 65
121 251
Speed 45
85 207
Total 415 Min Max

The ranges shown on the right are for a level 100 Pokémon. Maximum values are based on a beneficial nature, 252 EVs, 31 IVs; minimum values are based on a hindering nature, 0 EVs, 0 IVs.

Evolution chart

#0206
Dunsparce
Normal
(after Hyper Drill learned)
#0982
Dudunsparce
Two-Segment Form
Normal
(after Hyper Drill learned, rare)
#0982
Dudunsparce
Three-Segment Form
Normal

Dunsparce changes

  • In Generations 2-3, Dunsparce has a base experience yield of 75.
  • In Generation 4, Dunsparce has a base experience yield of 125.
  • In Generations 2-7, Dunsparce has a base Friendship value of 70.

Pokédex entries

Gold When spotted, this POKéMON escapes backward by furiously boring into the ground with its tail.
Silver If spotted, it escapes by burrowing with its tail. It can float just slightly using its wings.
Crystal It hides deep inside caves where no light ever reaches it and remains virtually motionless there.
Ruby
Sapphire		 DUNSPARCE has a drill for its tail. It uses this tail to burrow into the ground backwards. This POKéMON is known to make its nest in complex shapes deep under the ground.
FireRed If spotted, it escapes by burrowing with its tail. It can hover just slightly using its wings.
LeafGreen When spotted, this POKéMON escapes backward by furiously boring into the ground with its tail.
Emerald Its drill-tipped tail is used to burrow into the ground backwards. This POKéMON is known to make its nest in complex shapes deep under the ground.
Diamond
Pearl
Platinum		 It digs into the ground with its tail and makes a mazelike nest. It can fly just a little.
HeartGold When spotted, this Pokémon escapes backward by furiously boring into the ground with its tail.
SoulSilver If spotted, it escapes by burrowing with its tail. It can float just slightly using its wings.
Black
White		 It digs into the ground with its tail and makes a mazelike nest. It can fly just a little.
Black 2
White 2		 It creates mazes in dark locations. When spotted, it flees into the ground by digging with its tail.
X When spotted, this Pokémon escapes backward by furiously boring into the ground with its tail.
Y It digs into the ground with its tail and makes a mazelike nest. It can fly just a little.
Omega Ruby
Alpha Sapphire		 Dunsparce has a drill for its tail. It uses this tail to burrow into the ground backward. This Pokémon is known to make its nest in complex shapes deep under the ground.
Ultra Sun It travels by digging through the ground. Diglett and Dunsparce share one another’s tunnels happily.
Ultra Moon When it sees a person, it digs a hole with its tail to make its escape. If you happen to find one, consider yourself lucky.
Sword This Pokémon’s tiny wings have some scientists saying that Dunsparce used to fly through the sky in ancient times.
Shield The nests Dunsparce live in are mazes of tunnels. They never get lost in their own nests—they can tell where they are by the scent of the dirt.
Brilliant Diamond
Shining Pearl		 It digs into the ground with its tail and makes a mazelike nest. It can fly just a little.
Scarlet It creates mazes in dark locations. When spotted, it flees into the ground by digging with its tail.
Violet If spotted, it escapes by burrowing with its tail. It can float just slightly using its wings.

Legends: Z-A Scarlet/Violet

Moves learnt by level up

Dunsparce does not learn any level up moves in Pokémon Legends: Z-A.

Moves learnt by TM

Dunsparce cannot be taught any TM moves in Pokémon Legends: Z-A.
